$schema-comment: Declarative source manifest for scripts/import-protocols.mjs. Add new sources by appending an entry. priority decides who wins on name collision (lower = higher priority). license is the source-level fallback if a SKILL.md has no per-file license. paths is the list of subdirs (relative to repo root) to walk for SKILL.md files; empty array means walk the whole repo. excludePaths skips subtrees (e.g. proprietary skills inside an otherwise-MIT repo).

sources.attribution: Antigravity Awesome Skills (MIT, code; CC-BY-4.0, docs). Source: https://github.com/sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills
